<!-- Code generated from the comments of the ObjectStorageConfig struct in post-processor/mws-export/config.go; DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY -->

- `service_account` (string) - MWS Service Account for generation of temporal hmac-key.
  Required, unless access_key and secret_key are provided

- `access_key` (string) - AccessKey is part of hmac-key pair for object storage.

- `secret_key` (string) - SecretKey is part of hmac-key pair for object storage.

- `object_storage_region` (string) - Object storage region where the bucket is located (defaults to "ru-central1").

- `object_storage_key` (string) - Object storage path where the image will be stored (defaults to "packer-images/{{image_for_export}}.qcow2")

- `object_storage_endpoint` (string) - Endpoint of object storage to upload image (defaults to "https://storage.mwsapis.ru").

<!-- End of code generated from the comments of the ObjectStorageConfig struct in post-processor/mws-export/config.go; -->
